keyProperties.Icon: The type of icon to display (e.g., Edit, Cancel).

additionalProperties.Color: The color of the text in a control.
additionalProperties.DisplayMode: Whether the control allows user input (Edit), only displays data (View), or is disabled (Disabled).
additionalProperties.Fill: The background color of a control.
additionalProperties.Height: The distance between a control's top and bottom edges.
additionalProperties.OnSelect: Actions to perform when the user taps or clicks a control.
additionalProperties.Visible: Whether a control appears or is hidden.
additionalProperties.Width: The distance between a control's left and right edges.
additionalProperties.X: The distance between the left edge of a control and its parent container.
additionalProperties.Y: The distance between the top edge of a control and its parent container.
